page_metadata.biotools__summary: This project provides a freely accessible three-dimensional statistical shape model (SSM) of the tibia, the MATLAB scripts for generating a SSM and the segmented surface models of the cortical and trabecular bone.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This project provides a freely accessible three-dimensional statistical shape model (SSM) of the tibia, the MATLAB scripts for generating a SSM and the segmented surface models of the cortical and trabecular bone.
